title: tritonia gladiolaris
intro: Tritonia gladiolaris, also known as the sword lily or gladiolus tritonia, is a flowering plant species in the Iridaceae family. It is native to South Africa and is prized for its vibrant flowers, which are used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues, including skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Tritonia gladiolaris can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments for topical application, with potential health benefits including wound healing and anti-aging properties.
